entry.title: New: RES24-259 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAX COMPROMISES.

Approves a compromise of real property taxes, consistent with the City Council’s policy in Resolution No. 11-259, for tax year 2024-25 on real property owned by Blood Bank of Hawai’i and used for nonprofit purpose.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
